candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and equals top-line sales in the preview.
Not revenue; operating expense line.
Direct sales/revenue line; appears identical to Total Revenue and can serve as alternate label over time.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; both are valid top-line rows and appear identical in the preview.

candidates.why: Direct cost-of-sales style line for a services business.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost of sales/services row.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Possible SG&A component, but the same row label appears more than once and is therefore ambiguous without row-position context.
Explicit SG&A row; per rules this should be included, especially since labels may change over time.
Clear SG&A overhead component and populated in recent years.
Possible overhead bucket for earlier years, but broad and may include non-SG&A functions.
Balance sheet accrual, not an income statement operating expense.

variables.notes: Included the explicit SG&A row plus the closest overhead buckets from candidates for coverage across years. Excluded the duplicated 'Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' label because it appears multiple times and is ambiguous, and excluded the balance-sheet accrual item.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Research & Development
candidates.why: R&D sub-component rather than the main reported R&D line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization component; excluded by SG&A rules and not preferred for XRD when a direct R&D expense line exists.
Capitalization adjustment, not the reported R&D expense line.
Depreciation/amortization-related, not core R&D expense.
Amortization-related, not core R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised development costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not expense.

variables.notes: Used the direct R&D expense line only, as required for a single reported line item.

candidates.why: Net finance cost line; acceptable fallback if direct interest expense is unavailable.
Direct interest expense line and preferred choice.
Too broad and not specifically interest.
Broader finance expense line; useful fallback in years where direct interest expense may not be separately shown.
Lease-interest subcomponent only, not full interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure only, not full interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list starts with direct interest expense, then broader finance expense / net finance cost fallbacks.

candidates.why: Direct equity line and appears equivalent to parent equity here.

candidates.row_label: EQUITY Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match because it is explicitly attributable to parent shareholders and excludes NCI.
Balancing line, not an equity measure.
Whole balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: EQUITY Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred the parent-attributable equity line to avoid double counting with MIB; included shareholders' equity total as backup.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement subtotal, not a balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests row is present. Since BE uses parent-attributable equity, MIB should be zero.
